frontmatter.title: Mosaic: Runtime-Efficient Multi-Agent Embodied Planning
frontmatter.description: Mosaic enables low-latency multi-agent planning by combining lightweight state tracking and constraint-guided coordination, achieving up to 32% faster execution and 10% point higher success rates.

frontmatter.title: Memory Savings at What Cost? A Study of Alternatives to Backpropagation
frontmatter.description: This work systematically studies memory-efficient alternatives to backpropagation for LLMs, highlighting that FmAD and ZO save activation memory but incur higher compute, slower convergence, and lower accuracy.

frontmatter.title: Atom: Efficient On-Device Video-Language Pipelines Through Modular Reuse
frontmatter.description: Atom is an on-device system that speeds up video-language pipelines by decomposing large models into reusable modules, enabling parallel execution and reducing latency by ~30% with minimal performance loss.

frontmatter.title: Thinking Forward: Memory-Efficient Federated Finetuning of Language Models
frontmatter.description: Spry is a federated learning algorithm that enables finetuning LLMs using Forward-mode Auto Differentiation; to achieve low memory footprint, high accuracy, and fast convergence.

frontmatter.title: Flow: Fine-grained Personalized Federated Learning through Dynamic Routing
frontmatter.venue: Published @ NeurIPS, 2023; Preliminary Presentation @ CrossFL, MLSys 2022
frontmatter.description: Flow addresses the challenge of statistical heterogeneity in federated learning through creating a dynamic personalized model for each input instance through a routing mechanism.

frontmatter.title: Flash: Concept Drift Adaptation in Federated Learning
frontmatter.description: Flash uses client-side early-stopping training to facilitate detection of concept drifts and the server-side drift-aware adaptive optimization in a Federated Learning setup, to solve concept drift detection and adaptation challenges.

frontmatter.title: CommunityBots: Creating and Evaluating A Multi-Agent Chatbot Platform for Public Input Elicitation
frontmatter.description: Multi-agent chatbots, like CommunityBots, improve user engagement and response quality over single-agent systems in multi-topic conversations by effectively managing topic and agent transitions.
